title: Infosys collaborates with IHH Healthcare on multi-country AI-powered ERP transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with IHH Healthcare for a multi-year, enterprise-wide ERP transformation program across IHH markets, starting with Hong Kong, Malaysia, and Singapore. The program will use Infosys Topaz to embed generative and agentic AI capabilities into IHH's core business workflows. Infosys will help consolidate IHH's legacy, siloed ERP landscape and integrate finance, procurement, supply chain, human capital management, and enterprise performance management, with stated aims including process standardization, operational streamlining, improved scalability, cost optimization, regulatory compliance, and real-time decision intelligence. No contract value was disclosed.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys will work with IHH Healthcare on a multi-year, enterprise-wide ERP transformation program to standardize and harmonize business processes across IHH markets starting with Hong Kong, Malaysia, and Singapore.
partnerships_or_deals.section_heading: IHH Healthcare Collaborates with Infosys on a Multi-Country, AI-Powered ERP Transformation to Accelerate Growth

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting and technology services, today announced a strategic collaboration with IHH Healthcare, one of the world's largest private healthcare providers, to drive a multi-year,  enterprise-wide  ERP  transformation  program.
important_text_spans.section_heading: IHH Healthcare Collaborates with Infosys on a Multi-Country, AI-Powered ERP Transformation to Accelerate Growth
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the existence, counterparty, and multi-year nature of the collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: This  collaboration  will  enable  IHH  to standardize  and  harmonize  business  processes  across  all  its  markets  starting  with  Hong  Kong, Malaysia, and Singapore.
important_text_spans.section_heading: IHH Healthcare Collaborates with Infosys on a Multi-Country, AI-Powered ERP Transformation to Accelerate Growth
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the initial geographic scope and process-standardization objective.

important_text_spans.text: The collaboration brings together Infosys' AI-first capabilities through Infosys Topaz, an AI-first offering powered by generative and agentic AI technologies, to embed intelligence into IHH's core business workflows.
important_text_spans.section_heading: IHH Healthcare Collaborates with Infosys on a Multi-Country, AI-Powered ERP Transformation to Accelerate Growth
important_text_spans.reason: Shows the role of Infosys Topaz and AI capabilities in the deal.

processing_notes: No deal value or financial impact was disclosed. Infosys Topaz was treated as supporting context within the client collaboration rather than a separate product or platform event.
